tools.name: memory.upsert
tools.label: Store memory
tools.description: Create or update a memory entry in Chatons internal memory store. Supports global personal memory and project-scoped memory.
tools.promptSnippet: Store durable memory for this user or project.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool when the user explicitly asks to remember something later.
Use scope=global for personal preferences or user facts that should apply across projects.
Use scope=project for repository-specific, task-specific, or project-context knowledge.

kind.description: Memory kind, e.g. preference, fact, profile, decision, context.

title.description: Short title for the memory entry.

id.description: Optional existing memory id to overwrite.

tools.name: memory.search
tools.label: Search memory
tools.description: Search Chatons memory using a lightweight local embedding index. Can search global memory, project memory, or both.
tools.promptSnippet: Search stored memory by semantic similarity.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool before asking the user again for information that may have been remembered.
Prefer scope=project for project questions and scope=global for personalization questions.
Use scope=all when both personal and project memory may matter.

projectId.description: Project id for project scope or mixed search.

tools.name: memory.get
tools.label: Get memory entry
tools.description: Fetch a memory entry by id.

tools.name: memory.update
tools.label: Update memory entry
tools.description: Update an existing memory entry by id and refresh its embedding.

tools.name: memory.delete
tools.label: Delete memory entry
tools.description: Delete a memory entry permanently by id.

tools.name: memory.list
tools.label: List memories
tools.description: List stored memories with optional scope, project, kind, and archive filters.
